chunks.text: Friedberg and Chamath welcome Senator Ron Johnson
The Reconciliation Bill process, how much the Big, Beautiful Bill will add to the national debt
Problems with growing our way out of debt, why elected officials are avoiding the fiscal reality
How Senator Johnson will force a real review of the Big, Beautiful Bill; future of MAGA and the Conservative movement
Next steps if the Big, Beautiful Bill passes
